allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''./package-lock.json''\); console.log\(''lockfileVersion:'', l.lockfileVersion\); console.log\(''npm used to generate \(from packages[""""]\):'', JSON.stringify\(l.packages?.['''']?.engines ?? ''not set''\)\)")
